turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello, this is Morgan. How can I help with your account today?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Before we start, this call may be recorded for quality and training.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: To make changes I'll need to verify you. What's the account email?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Of course, both are what you have on file.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I'm moving to a different service, so I need to cancel.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sorry to hear that. Let me pull up your plan and walk you through it.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I can cancel today, just so you know it stays active until the cycle ends.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: No, I've made up my mind, I just want it cancelled.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay, so I won't be charged again after this, right?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Your cancellation is confirmed for the end of the cycle. Anything else?
